gates.label: schema migration approval gate
gates.schemaDiffRootPolicy: schema diff root is required before any migration mutates a lane database
gates.generatedTypeRootPolicy: generated type root must be refreshed or explicitly proved unchanged after schema dry-run
gates.dryRunCommand: pnpm run db:reset as disposable local schema dry-run
gates.reviewerApprovalEvidence: migration pull request review approval plus schema diff root
gates.rollbackPlan: rollback by reverting migration file, replaying disposable database reset, and recording repair proof root
gates.workflowBinding: ci.yml Supabase local reset and bitcode-gate-quality validation
gates.blockingFailureMode: block deployment until migration approval, dry-run, type check, and rollback proof are present

gates.label: generated database type refresh gate
gates.schemaDiffRootPolicy: schema diff root from the migration approval must be carried into type refresh evidence
gates.generatedTypeRootPolicy: database.generated.ts and database.ts digest roots are required after refresh
gates.dryRunCommand: pnpm run db:schema-types:check as generated type refresh dry-run
gates.reviewerApprovalEvidence: review approval confirms generated type roots match applied migrations
gates.rollbackPlan: rollback by restoring previous generated type roots and rerunning schema type check
gates.blockingFailureMode: block deployment when generated types are stale, missing, or not review-approved

gates.label: route scan approval gate
gates.schemaDiffRootPolicy: route scan records whether schema mutation is absent or already linked to a migration approval
gates.generatedTypeRootPolicy: route scan records the generated type root consumed by API and interface route contracts
gates.dryRunCommand: pnpm --dir uapi exec jest route contract subset as route scan dry-run
gates.validationCommand: pnpm --dir uapi exec jest --runInBand selected route and interface contract tests
gates.reviewerApprovalEvidence: review approval confirms route changes preserve shared interface contracts
gates.rollbackPlan: rollback by reverting route change, replaying route contract subset, and preserving previous interface root
gates.workflowBinding: bitcode-gate-quality staged Reading route and Terminal harness contracts
gates.blockingFailureMode: block deployment when route scans fail, drift from shared package contracts, or lack review proof

gates.label: build and test approval gate
gates.schemaDiffRootPolicy: build test gate consumes any migration schema diff root before deployment admission
gates.generatedTypeRootPolicy: build test gate consumes current generated type root before deployment admission
gates.dryRunCommand: pnpm workspace typecheck and focused package tests as build test dry-run
gates.reviewerApprovalEvidence: signed maintainer review approval plus passing required checks
gates.rollbackPlan: rollback by reverting the gate branch, rerunning package checks, and preserving prior proof roots
gates.workflowBinding: ci.yml and bitcode-gate-quality typecheck test build jobs
gates.blockingFailureMode: block deployment when required build, typecheck, or test jobs are red or unreviewed

gates.label: generated artifact freshness gate
gates.schemaDiffRootPolicy: generated artifact freshness records schema diff roots for any artifact affected by migrations
gates.generatedTypeRootPolicy: generated artifact freshness records type roots for artifacts derived from database contracts
gates.dryRunCommand: node scripts/check-bitcode-spec-family.mjs --version V34 --mode draft --current-target V33 as generated artifact dry-run
gates.reviewerApprovalEvidence: review approval confirms deterministic generated artifacts are current
gates.rollbackPlan: rollback by regenerating previous source-safe artifacts and rerunning spec family checks
gates.blockingFailureMode: block deployment when generated artifacts are stale, source-unsafe, or missing from canonical allowlist

gates.label: Vercel lane approval gate
gates.schemaDiffRootPolicy: Vercel lane approval carries schema diff root before preview or staging deployment unlock
gates.generatedTypeRootPolicy: Vercel lane approval carries generated type root before preview or staging deployment unlock
gates.dryRunCommand: pnpm --dir uapi exec jest pipeline harness preflight as Vercel lane dry-run
gates.reviewerApprovalEvidence: review approval confirms Vercel preview lane environment and Sandbox posture are non-value
gates.rollbackPlan: rollback by disabling preview promotion, reverting lane env binding, and replaying harness preflight
gates.workflowBinding: Vercel preview deployment plus bitcode-gate-quality preflight
gates.blockingFailureMode: block deployment when Vercel auth, Sandbox posture, route build, or lane binding is missing

gates.label: Supabase lane approval gate
gates.schemaDiffRootPolicy: Supabase lane approval carries schema diff root and readback root before database projection unlock
gates.generatedTypeRootPolicy: Supabase lane approval carries generated type root and ORM type root before database projection unlock
gates.dryRunCommand: pnpm run db:data-health:ci && pnpm run db:schema-types:check as Supabase lane dry-run
gates.validationCommand: pnpm run db:data-health:ci && pnpm run db:schema-types:check
gates.reviewerApprovalEvidence: review approval confirms Supabase lane project and generated type roots are aligned
gates.rollbackPlan: rollback by restoring previous migration state, replaying database projection repair, and rechecking schema types
gates.workflowBinding: ci.yml Supabase local stack and ORM schema type checks
gates.blockingFailureMode: block deployment when Supabase project, REST readback, DB readback, or type roots are misaligned

gates.label: canonical promotion commit approval gate
gates.schemaDiffRootPolicy: promotion commit approval carries final schema diff root and closed gate roots
gates.generatedTypeRootPolicy: promotion commit approval carries final generated type root and generated artifact roots
gates.validationCommand: future V34 promotion workflow runs all closed gate checks before committing BITCODE_SPEC.txt
gates.reviewerApprovalEvidence: version branch pull request approval plus green promotion workflow dry-run
gates.rollbackPlan: rollback by reverting promotion branch commit before merge or opening canon repair PR after merge
gates.workflowBinding: v34-canon-promotion.yml or Gate 10 promotion workflow successor
gates.blockingFailureMode: block promotion when closed gate roots, generated proofs, reviewer approval, or promotion dry-run are missing

requiredTokens.token: fails closed when a required approval gate is missing
fails closed when reviewer approval evidence is missing
fails closed when rollback plan is missing
fails closed on serialized secret-shaped values
